Author list and key first-author both wrong. Sadler, Michelle Vanni, Jiawei Han. The current entry has fabricated authors (Shang, Liu, Cheng, Peng, Ren, Han). Author field has malformed LaTeX diacritics: 'Sepp{"a}l{"a}, Otto' uses unbalanced quotes (will render as literal {'a}). Should be 'Sepp\"{a}l\"{a}, Otto' or 'Sepp{\"a}l{\"a}, Otto'.

suggested_fix.author: Ihantola, Petri and Ahoniemi, Tuukka and Karavirta, Ville and Sepp{\"a}l{\"a}, Otto

still_broken.issue: Key year 2025 mismatches entry year 2026 by 1 year (silent under §5 strict rule, but inconsistent with key naming). Project-name key — minor.

Schema mismatch: entry is @inproceedings but the booktitle is 'arXiv preprint arXiv:1811.02883' and publisher is 'arXiv' — that is not a real conference proceedings. SCALE-Sim 2018 was an arXiv preprint only (the ISPASS paper is the 2020 follow-up by Samajdar et al.). Should be @misc or @article with archiveprefix=arXiv.

Author list is wrong. Bib has 'Bambhaniya, Aman and Shao, Ritik and Juneja, Suhas Somashekar and others' but actual authors per arxiv:2406.01698 are 'Bambhaniya, Abhimanyu and Raj, Ritik and Jeong, Geonhwa and Kundu, Souvik and Srinivasan, Sudarshan and Elavazhagan, Midhilesh and Kumar, Madhu and Krishna, Tushar'. First author's first name is also wrong (Abhimanyu, not Aman).

suggested_fix.author: Bambhaniya, Abhimanyu and Raj, Ritik and Jeong, Geonhwa and Kundu, Souvik and Srinivasan, Sudarshan and Elavazhagan, Midhilesh and Kumar, Madhu and Krishna, Tushar

still_broken.issue: Author list is fabricated. Bib has 'Faiz, Ahmad and Kannan, Sotaro and Rishi, James and Chuber, James and Addanki, Raviteja and Noman, Abdulrahman' but the actual authors per arxiv:2309.14393 / ICLR 2024 are 'Faiz, Ahmad and Kaneda, Sotaro and Wang, Ruhan and Osi, Rita and Sharma, Prateek and Chen, Fan and Jiang, Lei'. Names are mostly wrong.

suggested_fix.author: Faiz, Ahmad and Kaneda, Sotaro and Wang, Ruhan and Osi, Rita and Sharma, Prateek and Chen, Fan and Jiang, Lei

still_broken.issue: Author list is wrong. Bib has 'Wang, Zhuo and Zheng, Weicheng and Liu, Chengwei and others' but actual first author per NSDI '25 paper is 'Xizheng Wang' (Alibaba Cloud), with co-authors that include Liang, Xu, Li, Chen, Zhai, Zhang, Zhang, Zhang, Liu, Zhang etc. (per dblp WangLXL0CZZZZLZ25). The current second/third names appear fabricated.

suggested_fix.author: Wang, Xizheng and others

still_broken.issue: Missing pages (4895--4901), publisher (Association for Computational Linguistics), and DOI (10.18653/v1/2023.emnlp-main.298) for an EMNLP 2023 conference paper. Per bib-check rule §3 conferences require publisher; per §4 EMNLP paper has page numbers and they must be included. Entry type @article is also incorrect; should be @inproceedings since this was published at EMNLP 2023, not just an arXiv preprint.

suggested_fix.booktitle: Proceedings of the 2023 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP)

still_broken.issue: Publisher field reads "National Institute for Science Education, University of Wisconsin–Madison" but the canonical publisher of this monograph is the Council of Chief State School Officers (CCSSO). NISE was a co-developer of the criteria but CCSSO is the publishing body per ERIC ED414305. Also the journal field is incorrectly used for a research monograph; entry type should be @techreport with institution = CCSSO, number = "Research Monograph No. 6".

suggested_fix.publisher: Council of Chief State School Officers
suggested_fix.institution: Council of Chief State School Officers

still_broken.issue: Author field uses "Chen, Tianqi and others" — incomplete (per §4a full names required). Title not protected: "automated end-to-end optimizing compiler for deep learning" should have OSDI venue rendered per §2 as "USENIX Symposium on Operating Systems Design and Implementation (OSDI)". Booktitle currently "13th USENIX Symposium on Operating Systems Design and Implementation (OSDI 18)" is acceptable. Missing url field.

suggested_fix.author: Chen, Tianqi and Moreau, Thierry and Jiang, Ziheng and Zheng, Lianmin and Yan, Eddie and Cowan, Meghan and Shen, Haichen and Wang, Leyuan and Hu, Yuwei and Ceze, Luis and Guestrin, Carlos and Krishnamurthy, Arvind

still_broken.issue: Author field uses "Dao, Tri and others" — incomplete (full author list is Tri Dao, Daniel Y. Fu, Stefano Ermon, Atri Rudra, Christopher Ré). Title acronym "IO" not protected per §1. Booktitle missing (NeurIPS) tag per §2. Missing publisher ("Curran Associates" per §3) and volume (35).

suggested_fix.author: Dao, Tri and Fu, Daniel Y. and Ermon, Stefano and Rudra, Atri and R{\'e}, Christopher
suggested_fix.title: {FlashAttention}: Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact Attention with {IO}-Awareness
suggested_fix.booktitle: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)

still_broken.issue: Title casing is wrong: should be "1.1 Computing's Energy Problem (and What We Can Do About It)" or at least Title Case per §1 first-word-after-colon protection ("computing's energy problem" all-lowercase is published title style on the IEEE PDF, but "and what we can do about it" is parenthetical and the leading numeral 1.1 is part of the published heading). Missing publisher (IEEE) per §3 and DOI (10.1109/ISSCC.2014.6757323). Journal field used but should be @inproceedings since this is a conference paper at ISSCC.

suggested_fix.booktitle: 2014 IEEE International Solid-State Circuits Conference Digest of Technical Papers (ISSCC)

still_broken.issue: Author field uses "Jouppi, Norman P and others" — incomplete (75 named coauthors per ACM record). Title casing: TPU acronym not protected per §1. Booktitle should follow §2 naming "International Symposium on Computer Architecture (ISCA)" (currently "Proceedings of the 44th Annual International Symposium on Computer Architecture" lacks the (ISCA) tag).

suggested_fix.title: In-Datacenter Performance Analysis of a {Tensor Processing Unit}
suggested_fix.booktitle: Proceedings of the 44th Annual International Symposium on Computer Architecture (ISCA)

still_broken.issue: Author list has spelling error and is incomplete. "Kasber, Prethvi" should be "Kashinkunti, Prethvi" per the published author list. Missing co-authors Julie Bernauer, Amar Phanishayee, Matei Zaharia. Booktitle should include (SC) tag per §2 standard. Missing pages.

suggested_fix.author: Narayanan, Deepak and Shoeybi, Mohammad and Casper, Jared and LeGresley, Patrick and Patwary, Mostofa and Korthikanti, Vijay Anand and Vainbrand, Dmitri and Kashinkunti, Prethvi and Bernauer, Julie and Catanzaro, Bryan and Phanishayee, Amar and Zaharia, Matei
suggested_fix.booktitle: Proceedings of the International Conference for High Performance Computing, Networking, Storage and Analysis (SC)

still_broken.issue: Publisher "Harvard University" is wrong. Per the textbook's official designation and the parallel entry in interviews/paper/references.bib, the publisher is MIT Press. Author should follow the same convention as elsewhere in the corpus: "Reddi, Vijay Janapa" (the periodic-table entry uses "Janapa Reddi, Vijay" which differs from interviews bib). Inconsistent author-name surnaming across two project bibs.

suggested_fix.author: Reddi, Vijay Janapa

still_broken.issue: Entry type is @inproceedings but booktitle = "arXiv preprint arXiv:1909.08053" — this is incorrect schema. arXiv preprints should be @article with journal field set, or @misc with eprint/archiveprefix. Megatron-LM was an arXiv preprint (later much-cited but never published at a venue). The interviews/paper/references.bib has the correct form for the same paper.

key prefix 'ashkboos' doesn't match first-author surname 'alistarh' (possible key/content drift); INSPECTION: QuaRot author order corrupted: actual NeurIPS 2024 byline is Ashkboos, Croci, Cameron et al., but entry has "Alistarh, Dan and Ashkboos, Saleh and Cameron, Pashmina ..." with Alistarh prepended. Senior author Alistarh moved to first position incorrectly.

suggested_fix.note: Reorder authors: Ashkboos, Saleh; Croci, Maximilian L.; Nrusimha, Marcelo G.; do Nascimento, Bo Li; Hoefler, Torsten; Hensman, James (NeurIPS 2024).

still_broken.issue: key prefix 'coe' doesn't match first-author surname 'munn' (possible key/content drift); INSPECTION: Single-author entry: Munn, Luke. Key surname "coe" is unexplained.

suggested_fix.note: Verify if a Munn 2023 paper is intended; if so, rename to munn2023ethical.

still_broken.issue: key prefix 'lecocq' doesn't match first-author surname 'winkler' (possible key/content drift); INSPECTION: Author Winkler first; this is IPCC AR6 WG3 Chapter 2 "Emissions trends and drivers" by Lecocq F. and many others. Lecocq is a coauthor, maybe even chapter lead, but Winkler was placed first in the entry.

suggested_fix.note: For IPCC AR6 WG3 Chapter 2, use Lecocq et al. (2022). Reorder authors with Lecocq first.

still_broken.issue: key prefix 'raffel' doesn't match first-author surname 'narang' (possible key/content drift); INSPECTION: Author Narang first - reordered author list. The T5 paper (JMLR 2020) byline is Raffel, Shazeer, Roberts, Lee, Narang, et al. Author order corrupted.

suggested_fix.note: Reorder authors with Raffel first (T5 paper, JMLR 2020).

still_broken.issue: key year 2019 differs from entry year 2024 by >1 (key/content drift); key prefix 'scaaml' doesn't match first-author surname 'bursztein' (possible key/content drift); INSPECTION: Year=2024 (TCHES paper "Generalized Power Attacks against Crypto Hardware"). The 2019 SCAAML library is a separate artifact; current entry is for the 2024 paper.

suggested_fix.note: Either rename to bursztein2024scaaml for the 2024 TCHES paper, or replace entry with the original 2019 SCAAML library reference (https://github.com/google/scaaml).

still_broken.issue: key year 2012 differs from entry year 2025 by >1 (key/content drift); INSPECTION: Date "2025-12-20" is corrupted CrossRef metadata. Actual paper is Shalev-Shwartz, "Online Learning and Online Convex Optimization", Foundations and Trends in ML, 4(2):107-194, 2011/2012.

suggested_fix.note: Date field contains corrupt 2025-12-20 from CrossRef. Original publication is Foundations and Trends in ML 4(2):107-194, 2011/2012.

still_broken.issue: key year 2016 differs from entry year 2022 by >1 (key/content drift); key prefix 'who' doesn't match first-author surname 'park' (possible key/content drift); INSPECTION: Year=2022, author Park - "Lessons learned from WHO's late initial response to the Ebola outbreak" - this could be a 2022 retrospective or an attempt to cite the original WHO Ebola report. Title and content suggest content drift from original 2016 WHO report.

suggested_fix.note: Replace with the WHO Ebola response report (2014-2016) or its peer-reviewed retrospective.

still_broken.issue: key prefix 'zhang' doesn't match first-author surname 'andzhang' (possible key/content drift); INSPECTION: Author "and Zhang, Dongxia and Han, Xiaoqing and and Deng, Chunyu and ..." - first author corrupted with leading "and" and trailing "and"s throughout list. Likely a parsing/import artifact.

suggested_fix.note: Re-parse author field — current value has stray "and" tokens.

still_broken.issue: Schema redundancy: entry has both `journal` and `booktitle` fields with the same NeurIPS venue. As @article with NeurIPS proceedings it should be either @inproceedings (booktitle, publisher Curran Associates) or remove the booktitle field. Per rule §3 NeurIPS publisher should be 'Curran Associates'.

suggested_fix.venue: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)

still_broken.issue: @misc entry stores arXiv id only in a free-form `note = {arXiv:2502.06982}` field with no `howpublished` or `url` pointing to the paper. Per rule §4, missing canonical locator. Add `howpublished = {\url{https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.06982}}` or `url = {https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.06982}`.

Year 2024 may be off — SGLang preprint arXiv:2312.07104 was first posted December 2023. Camera-ready/journal/conference acceptance year may be 2024 (NeurIPS/MLSys), but as an arxiv preprint citing the 2023 v1 the year should be 2023; if citing the 2024 published venue, change journal field. Mild ambiguity.

Missing `pages` field — the canonical CCS '16 paper has pages 308-318 (the mlsysim/paper version of this entry has them). Per rule §4 'every conference paper that has page numbers needs them in the entry'.

Same as in mlsysim/paper bib: SGLang arXiv:2312.07104 was first posted December 2023. Year 2024 may refer to camera-ready acceptance, but as an arxiv preprint citation the year is typically 2023. Minor.

Missing url field for ICLR oral with no DOI. Per bib-check §4, every entry must include a DOI or working URL as canonical locator. Recommend adding url to the OpenReview forum entry. Otherwise content is correct (verified at ICLR 2024 oral).

Author field uses "Asanovic, Krste and others" — incomplete. Per bib-check §4a, full author lists should be supplied where canonically known. The full author list is: Krste Asanović, Ras Bodik, Bryan Christopher Catanzaro, Joseph James Gebis, Parry Husbands, Kurt Keutzer, David A. Patterson, William Lester Plishker, John Shalf, Samuel Webb Williams, Katherine A. Yelick.

still_broken.issue: Booktitle "Proceedings of Machine Learning and Systems" should explicitly include the (MLSys) acronym per §2: "Proceedings of Machine Learning and Systems (MLSys)". Also missing volume (3) and url/pages.

suggested_fix.booktitle: Proceedings of Machine Learning and Systems (MLSys)

still_broken.issue: Author field uses "Lattner, Chris and others" — incomplete (full list is Lattner, Amini, Bondhugula, Cohen, Davis, Pienaar, Riddle, Shpeisman, Vasilache, Zinenko). Per §4a full names required where known.
